parts.text: I am inquiring about business satellite tv.
What other internet products you have for businesses? Can you give me more information about Fibre internet?
I have internet with Rogers and I'm looking for voice solution for my business.
I would like to switch internet service from a different carrier to Rogers so I will have one provider for all my services.
I'm adding business phone and internet in my office.
I would like to install TV in my business.
I'm opening a new store and would like new services set up in the new location.
I would like to activate wireless phone to add in my Internet account.
